opinion.h4: ESTRIN ET AL. v. MOSS, COMMISSIONER OF AGRICULTURE OF TENNESSEE, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF TENNESSEE. No. 684. Decided January 13, 1969.
opinion.p: George F. McCanless, Attorney General of Tennessee, and Paul E. Jennings, Assistant Attorney General, for appellees.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
393 U.S. 318 WARD ET AL. v. JOHNSON, PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF ILLINOIS. No. 703. Decided January 13, 1969.
The motion to dispense with printing the jurisdictional statement is granted. The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction.
